overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a dark fantasy video game (Bloodborne) showing a character in a long coat and hat exploring a foggy gothic urban environment at night. The character traverses wet cobblestones, ascends a wide stone staircase, and walks along an elevated pathway illuminated by warm street lamps against the misty blue atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy cobblestone courtyard with vintage vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking across wet cobblestones toward a wide stone staircase illuminated by a warm street lamp

entered.detail: Old-fashioned black automobile parked on the wet cobblestones
Wide stone stairs with metal railings leading up to an elevated building entrance
Dark red brick facade with weathered texture running alongside the courtyard
Warm glowing lamp post at the top of the stairs cutting through the fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy gothic courtyard at night with wet cobblestone ground. A vintage black sedan is parked to the left while the character walks toward a wide stone staircase ahead. The atmosphere is thick with mist, illuminated by a single warm street lamp at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone staircase with wrought iron railings

events.description: character transitions from walking on flat ground to ascending the stone staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the upper level, moving from the open courtyard to the elevated walkway

entered.detail: Ornate wrought iron railing running along the right side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the wide stone staircase, transitioning from the open courtyard to a more enclosed space. The wrought iron handrail appears on the right while the brick wall looms close on the left. The vintage car disappears from view below as the character climbs toward the warm glow of the street lamp above.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with metal railing overlooking lower city

events.description: character reaches the top of the stairs and emerges onto an elevated walkway with city views

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated pathway past rectangular planters, with a metal railing on the right overlooking the foggy lower area

entered.detail: Black metal safety railing running along the right edge of the elevated path
Stone planter box containing dense green shrubbery against the building wall
Tall stone tower visible through the thick fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the character emerges onto an elevated walkway lined with planters on the left and a metal railing on the right. The path overlooks the foggy city below, with a distant gothic tower barely visible through the mist. The street lamp now falls behind to the left as the character continues forward along the wet stone pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty gothic courtyard up toward an elevated urban walkway overlooking a fog-shrouded city. It begins on wet cobblestones beside a parked vintage black sedan, moving forward through thick mist toward a wide stone staircase illuminated by a distant warm street lamp. As the character ascends the stairs, the open courtyard gives way to a more enclosed space defined by a looming brick wall on the left and a wrought iron handrail on the right. The scene then opens up as the character reaches the top, emerging onto a wet stone walkway lined with planters and a metal railing. Finally, the camera pushes forward along the path, leaving the street lamp behind while a distant gothic tower becomes faintly visible through the heavy blue haze.
